name: Simulation
onCreateCommand: pip install -r requirements.txt && pip install ipykernel && python3 -m ipykernel install --user --name python311 --display-name 'Python 3.11' && /usr/bin/python3.13 -m pip install ipykernel && /usr/bin/python3.13 -m ipykernel install --user --name python313 --display-name 'Python 3.13'
